title: 「Too + 形容詞 + to + 動詞」句型
titleZh: 「Too + 形容詞 + to + 動詞」句：表達「太……而不能……」
titleEn: Using Too + adjective + to + verb to express that something is too… to do

source.file: Sentence Structure 72 -「Too + 形容詞 + to + 動詞」句.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + be + too + adjective + to + base verb + other information

formulas.labelZh: 同一個人或事物進行動作
formulas.labelEn: The same person or thing performs the action
formulas.formula: Subject + be + too + adjective + to + base verb + other information

formulas.labelEn: State who cannot perform the action
formulas.formula: Subject + be + too + adjective + for + someone + to + base verb + other information

formulas.labelZh: 句子的主語是動作的承受者
formulas.formula: Thing + be + too + adjective + to + base verb

example: The soup was too hot to drink.

examples.en: The soup was too hot to drink.
The night was too cold for us to sleep.
examples.zh: 晚上太冷，我們無法入睡。
examples.highlight: too cold for us to sleep

examples.en: The book was too hard to understand.

meaning.zh: Too + 形容詞 + to + 動詞 表示某種程度超出可接受的範圍，令動作不能完成、不適合進行或非常困難。

rules.zh: Too 並不只是表示「非常」；它表示程度超出可以接受的範圍，並因此令某個動作不能完成、不適合進行或非常困難。
rules.en: Too does not merely mean very; it shows that a degree prevents or seriously limits an action.

rules.zh: To 後面的動詞使用原形。
rules.en: Use the base form of the verb after to.

rules.zh: 當另一個人進行動作時，使用 for + someone。
rules.en: Use for + someone when a different person performs the action.
examples: The box is too heavy for Amy to lift.

rules.en: Do not repeat the object of the action.
examples: The book is too difficult to understand.

rules.en: Make the verb be agree with the required tense.

rules.zh: Too…to 與 adjective + enough + to 的意思相反。
rules.en: Too + adjective + to and adjective + enough + to express opposite meanings.

benefits.zh: 清楚說明「為甚麼不能做」，讓讀者立即知道哪個情況阻止了動作。
benefits.en: It clearly explains why an action cannot be performed.

benefits.zh: 把「情況」和「不能進行的動作」放在同一句中，不需要寫成兩句。
benefits.en: It combines the condition and the impossible action in one sentence.

benefits.zh: 與 so + adjective + that + cannot 相比，這個句型通常更簡潔。
benefits.en: It makes an explanation shorter and more direct.

benefits.zh: 適合表達物件、食物、道路、工作、價格和個人狀態等日常限制和安全問題。
benefits.en: It is useful for everyday limitations and safety problems.

benefits.zh: 學會這個句型後，可以用另一種自然方法表達相同意思，增加句式變化。
benefits.en: It adds sentence variety instead of repeatedly using because, so, cannot or could not.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using too + adjective + to + verb.
Preserve the original meaning, tense and person performing the action.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 too + 形容詞 + to + 動詞 改寫以下句子。
答案須保留原句的意思、時態，以及進行動作的人。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The tea is so hot that nobody can drink it now.
questions.promptZh: 這杯茶太熱，現在沒有人能喝。
questions.answer: The tea is too hot to drink now.
questions.answerZh: 這杯茶太熱，現在不能喝。
questions.highlight: The tea is too hot to drink now.

questions.prompt: I cannot carry this bag because it is extremely heavy.
questions.promptZh: 這個袋子非常重，我拿不動。
questions.answer: This bag is too heavy for me to carry.
questions.answerZh: 這個袋子太重，我拿不動。
questions.highlight: This bag is too heavy for me to carry.

questions.prompt: Mia was extremely tired. She could not finish her homework.
questions.promptZh: 米婭非常疲倦。她無法完成功課。
questions.answer: Mia was too tired to finish her homework.
questions.answerZh: 米婭太疲倦，無法完成功課。
questions.highlight: Mia was too tired to finish her homework.

questions.prompt: The music is so loud that we cannot hear the teacher.
questions.promptZh: 音樂聲太大，我們聽不到老師說話。
questions.answer: The music is too loud for us to hear the teacher.
questions.answerZh: 音樂聲太大，我們聽不到老師說話。
questions.highlight: The music is too loud for us to hear the teacher.

questions.prompt: Ben is not old enough to drive a car.
questions.promptZh: 本的年齡還未足以駕駛汽車。
questions.answer: Ben is too young to drive a car.
questions.answerZh: 本年紀太小，不能駕駛汽車。
questions.highlight: Ben is too young to drive a car.

questions.prompt: The room was so dark that we could not read there.
questions.promptZh: 房間太暗，我們無法在那裏閱讀。
questions.answer: The room was too dark for us to read in.
questions.answerZh: 房間太暗，我們無法在裏面閱讀。
questions.highlight: The room was too dark for us to read in.

questions.prompt: I cannot go shopping today because I am very busy.
questions.promptZh: 我今天非常忙，不能去購物。
questions.answer: I am too busy to go shopping today.
questions.answerZh: 我今天太忙，不能去購物。
questions.highlight: I am too busy to go shopping today.

questions.prompt: The shoes are so small that Leo cannot wear them.
questions.promptZh: 這雙鞋太小，里奧穿不下。
questions.answer: The shoes are too small for Leo to wear.
questions.answerZh: 這雙鞋太小，里奧穿不下。
questions.highlight: The shoes are too small for Leo to wear.

questions.prompt: It is impossible for anyone to answer the question because it is extremely difficult.
questions.promptZh: 這道問題非常困難，沒有人能回答。
questions.answer: The question is too difficult to answer.
questions.answerZh: 這道問題太難，無法回答。
questions.highlight: The question is too difficult to answer.

questions.prompt: The water was so cold that we could not swim in it.
questions.promptZh: 當時水太冷，我們無法在裏面游泳。
questions.answer: The water was too cold for us to swim in.
questions.answerZh: 當時水太冷，我們無法在裏面游泳。
questions.highlight: The water was too cold for us to swim in.

questions.prompt: Amy cannot lift the box because it is extremely heavy.
questions.promptZh: 箱子非常重，艾米搬不動。
questions.answer: The box is too heavy for Amy to lift.
questions.answerZh: 箱子太重，艾米搬不動。
questions.highlight: The box is too heavy for Amy to lift.

questions.prompt: Jason’s voice was so quiet that we could not hear it clearly.
questions.promptZh: 傑森的聲音太小，我們聽不清楚。
questions.answer: Jason’s voice was too quiet for us to hear clearly.
questions.answerZh: 傑森的聲音太小，我們聽不清楚。

questions.prompt: The shelf is very high. The child cannot reach it.
questions.promptZh: 架子很高，孩子碰不到。
questions.answer: The shelf is too high for the child to reach.
questions.answerZh: 架子太高，孩子碰不到。
questions.highlight: The shelf is too high for the child to reach.

questions.prompt: Sarah was so nervous that she could not speak clearly.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉太緊張，無法清楚說話。
questions.answer: Sarah was too nervous to speak clearly.

questions.prompt: I cannot buy this jacket because it is extremely expensive.

questions.prompt: The road is not wide enough for two buses to pass.
questions.promptZh: 這條路不夠寬，無法讓兩輛巴士同時通過。

questions.prompt: The soup was so salty that we could not eat it.
questions.promptZh: 湯太鹹，我們無法食用。
questions.answer: The soup was too salty for us to eat.

questions.highlight: The soup was too salty for us to eat.

questions.prompt: Why did Olivia stop walking? She was so tired that she could not continue.
questions.promptZh: 奧莉花為甚麼停下來？她太疲倦，無法繼續走。
questions.answer: Olivia was too tired to continue walking.

questions.prompt: The instructions were so confusing that the students could not follow them.

questions.prompt: It was impossible for the suitcase to fit in the locker because it was extremely large.
questions.promptZh: 行李箱非常大，無法放進儲物櫃。
questions.answer: The suitcase was too large to fit in the locker.

questions.prompt: The patient was very weak. He could not stand without help.

questions.prompt: The print is so small that I cannot read it without my glasses.
questions.promptZh: 字體太小，我沒有眼鏡便無法閱讀。
questions.answer: The print is too small for me to read without my glasses.

questions.highlight: The print is too small for me to read without my glasses.

questions.prompt: The ice is not thick enough for us to walk on safely.
questions.promptZh: 冰層不夠厚，我們無法安全地在上面行走。
questions.answer: The ice is too thin for us to walk on safely.
questions.answerZh: 冰層太薄，我們無法安全地在上面行走。
questions.highlight: The ice is too thin for us to walk on safely.

questions.prompt: Kevin is not patient enough to wait for the full explanation.
questions.promptZh: 凱文不夠有耐性，無法等候完整的解釋。
questions.answer: Kevin is too impatient to wait for the full explanation.

questions.highlight: Kevin is too impatient to wait for the full explanation.

questions.prompt: Beginners cannot use this machine because it is extremely complicated.
questions.promptZh: 這部機器非常複雜，初學者無法使用。

questions.highlight: The machine is too complicated for beginners to use.

questions.prompt: The hall was so crowded that not everyone could find a seat.
questions.promptZh: 禮堂太擠迫，並非每個人都能找到座位。
questions.answer: The hall was too crowded for everyone to find a seat.
questions.answerZh: 禮堂太擠迫，並非每個人都能找到座位。
questions.highlight: The hall was too crowded for everyone to find a seat.

questions.prompt: Because the wall is still very wet, it cannot be painted today.
questions.promptZh: 牆壁仍然非常濕，今天無法髹上油漆。
questions.answer: The wall is too wet to be painted today.

questions.prompt: The maths problem was so difficult that Nina could not solve it alone.
questions.promptZh: 這道數學題太難，妮娜無法獨自解答。

questions.highlight: The maths problem was too difficult for Nina to solve alone.

questions.prompt: Our car is very old. It cannot make such a long journey safely.
questions.promptZh: 我們的汽車非常舊，無法安全地完成這麼長的旅程。
questions.answer: Our car is too old to make such a long journey safely.

questions.prompt: The vegetables were so hard that we could not cut them with a normal knife.
questions.promptZh: 蔬菜太硬，我們無法用普通的刀切開。
questions.answer: The vegetables were too hard for us to cut with a normal knife.

questions.highlight: That password is too complex for me to remember.
